title: Create+ Evolved
description: Basically every Create addon in existence, fine-tuned into one insane modpack.
body:
# **Create+ Evolved**

**Minecraft 1.20.1 | Forge**

**Create+ Evolved** is the ultimate evolution of the Create experience — a massive modpack focused entirely on pushing the limits of kinetic automation, engineering, and mechanical creativity. This pack brings together *every* Create addon that could possibly fit, combined with performance mods, visual enhancements, and quality-of-life improvements to make building more fluid, stable, and beautiful than ever.

---

## ⚙️ **What’s Inside**

### 🔩 *Full Create Ecosystem*
From **Create: Connected**, **Structures**, and **Big Contraptions**, to specialized addons like **Numismatics**, **Interiors**, **Molten Metals**, and **Central Kitchen** — if it expands Create, it’s probably here. Design complex factories, automate everything, and watch your world come alive with motion and sound.

### 💡 *Performance & Visuals*
Powered by **Embeddium**, **FerriteCore**, **ModernFix**, and **ImmediatelyFast**, the pack stays smooth even with huge contraptions. Pair it with **Iris + BSL Shaders** for stunning lighting, reflections, and atmosphere.

### 🧰 *Quality of Life*
Manage your creations effortlessly with **EMI**, **Sophisticated Storage**, **Xaero’s Minimap & World Map**, and **Jade**. Subtle tweaks like **Mouse Tweaks**, **AppleSkin**, and **Default Dark Mode** make gameplay feel clean and intuitive.

---

## 🌍 **Play Your Way**

Whether you’re an engineer, designer, or chaos-loving inventor, **Create+ Evolved** gives you every tool to automate, build, and break physics in glorious motion. Optimize your setups, design infinite machines, or just sit back and watch your gears spin.

---

### Notes
- All mods belong to their original authors
- Feel free to modify/redistribute this however you like, as long as you don't make an identical copy and claim it as your own creation
- I haven't tried using this on a server as it's meant to be a singleplayer modpack, however if you do I suggest removing all the client side only mods from the servers mods folder
